nodes.name: sorting_algorithms
nodes.description: Comparison and non-comparison sorting routines over one-dimensional arrays.

nodes.name: merge_sort
nodes.description: Stable comparison sort over a one-dimensional array.

outputs.name: sorted_array
outputs.constraints: sorted copy of the input array

nodes.conceptual_summary: Sort an array with a stable merge-based strategy.

nodes.name: quicksort
nodes.description: Average-case comparison sort over a one-dimensional array.

outputs.name: sorted_array
outputs.constraints: sorted copy of the input array

nodes.conceptual_summary: Sort an array with a quicksort strategy.

nodes.name: heapsort
nodes.description: Heap-based comparison sort over a one-dimensional array.

outputs.name: sorted_array
outputs.constraints: sorted copy of the input array

nodes.conceptual_summary: Sort an array with a heap-based strategy.

nodes.name: counting_sort
nodes.description: Count-based integer sorting for bounded discrete values.

outputs.name: sorted_array
outputs.constraints: sorted copy of the input integer array

nodes.conceptual_summary: Sort bounded integers with counting accumulation.

nodes.name: radix_sort
nodes.description: Digit-wise integer sorting for non-negative values.

outputs.name: sorted_array
outputs.constraints: sorted copy of the input integer array

nodes.conceptual_summary: Sort non-negative integers by repeated digit passes.
